lightcontrol

Controllables Editor

Move and rotate active fixtures, then export a new controllables.py.

Fixtures

0
Loading fixture data...
Click the anchor to select. T translate, R rotate, F frame, Esc clear selection.

Selection

Clean
Select a fixture in the list or click it in the viewport.

Axis

Free

Metadata

Python

Export

Download returns a new file. Write File stores it directly inside the parent project.
